top_findings.summary: The skill requests "Bash" as an allowed tool, which grants arbitrary system command execution capability. For a specialized process simulation/engineering analysis skill focused on heat integration calculations, this level of system access (full shell command execution) is excessive and unrelated to its stated purpose of data analysis, curve generation, and network design. While Read/Write/Edit permissions are reasonable for file I/O, and Glob/Grep for data extraction, Bash access creates unnecessary privilege escalation risk for what should be a controlled data processing application.
